Olly olly oxen free is a phrase used in children's games, which is generally used to indicate that people who are hiding (in a game of hide and seek, for example) can safely come out into the open.

1. Phrase used to question the wisdom of a smartass trying to pass off infomation on a topic you know the person knows little or nothing about. \r
\r
2.Can also be used to change the subject. \r
\r
Versatile phrase used as a put down.
> Guy 1: I think I need more fiber in my diet because I only shit once a day and my ass bleeds.
> Guy 2: What are you an ass[ologist]? or
> What are you a colon[ologist]? or

entries.d:
Olu.\r
How do you define it? One could ask, what is Olu. But they would be closer to the truth to ask ~when~ is Olu. Scientists over the years have proposed many theories. One such scientist living a [pooey] [schmelle schmelle]y [sad] life, who enjoyed [poo]ing, by the name of [Cobranium], claimed to have discovered a source featuring an output of sound, presumed the voice of ~THE~ OLU!!!!!!\r
\r
Some say it's just a myth, but others, oh the others...\r
\r
...believe it as a religion, as one of their own, however there is no strict evidence, or no way, discovered by me Cobrania, that anyone can ever know what, or when, Olu is.\r
\r
UPDATE: Olu is a man living in Croydon

> The city seems gripped by Olympics withdrawal. Our sports-crack is all gone.

entries.t: n. 奥林匹斯山, 天堂
entries.d: n. a mountain peak in northeast Greece near the Aegean coast; believed by ancient Greeks to be the dwelling place of the gods (9,570 feet high)

entries.t: n. 奥林索斯（古希腊一座城市）
[人名] 奥利芬特; [地名] [美国] 奥利凡特
